text.title: OpenTelemetry Collector Architecture Examples
text.summary: One worked end-to-end example showing the methodology applied to a realistic instance, from inputs through to the final spec artefact.

step.name: inputs
step.code: trigger_context: ticket: INFRA-1234 summary: Acme Corp quarterly review for opentelemetry-collector-architecture inputs_used: - name: previous-cycle-artefact source: artefacts/opentelemetry-collector-architecture-acme-2026q1.json - name: team-roster source: wiki/acme/team-roster owner: ruslan@faion.net storage_location: artefacts/opentelemetry-collector-architecture-acme-2026q2.json

step.name: decision-tree-walk
step.p: Root question evaluated TRUE (preconditions hold). Conclusion = run-the-checklist (rule id from 01-core-rules.xml).

step.name: filled-artefact
step.code: { "artefact_id": "opentelemetry-collector-architecture-acme-2026q2", "produces": "spec", "owner": "ruslan@faion.net", "version": "1.0.0", "last_reviewed": "2026-05-23", "inputs_used": [ {"name": "previous-cycle-artefact", "source": "artefacts/opentelemetry-collector-architecture-acme-2026q1.json"}, {"name": "team-roster", "source": "wiki/acme/team-roster"} ], "decision": "Promote to active after 7-day soak; next review 2026-08-23.", "rationale": "Previous-cycle-artefact shows the same triggering activity recurring; team-roster confirms a named owner; no Skip-If predicate fired.", "trace_refs": ["INFRA-1234", "artefacts/opentelemetry-collector-architecture-acme-2026q1.json"], "status": "active" }

step.name: validator-run
step.code: $ python scripts/validate-opentelemetry-collector-architecture.py artefacts/opentelemetry-collector-architecture-acme-2026q2.json OK: artefact valid (schema + forbidden-pattern checks pass)

step.name: handoff
step.p: Artefact committed to `artefacts/opentelemetry-collector-architecture-acme-2026q2.json`; named owner notified by Slack; next review scheduled for 2026-08-23 (90 days).
